utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: Okay ! Feel free to look , but I am telling you those contracts are not on this desk .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh how can you possibly know ? Look at this mess , Tag ! I mean , this is what I’m talking about ! You have to be organized ! You’ve got newspapers ! You’ve got magazines ! You got ... Ohh !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , very cute braces . Anyway you know what , the point is Tag , start looking because you are going to find those contracts on your desk .

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: So when do you imagine you gave them to me ? In the morning or in the afternoon ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_So when do you imagine you gave them to me ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: In the afternoon . Mr . Zelner came into my office after lunch . He put them on my desk , and then I put a Post ... It on it .
